description: Legal declaration in which the witnesses attest to the victory of Mūsā b. al-Ahuv (alias Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi) over Yiṣḥaq al-Siqillī in retaining the position of muqaddam of Qalyūb during Sar Shalom’s gaonate. Dated: Saturday, 6 Av 1506 = 15 July 1195 CE. Contains illuminating passages about the qualifications (lines 17-21) and the privileges (lines 21-24) of a muqaddam and the election process. Dated Sunday the 7th of Av, 1506/1195. In the handwriting of Moshe b. Levi himself. See also T-S 13J20.18 (in which Moshe b. Levi beseeches Sar Shalom not to believe an enemy's slander against him) and ENA 4020.4 (in which Sar Shalom confirms Moshe's position as cantor and slaughterer of Qalyub). ASE
description_he: הצהרה משפטית בה העדים מאשרים ניצחונו של מוסא ב. אל-אהוב (=משה ב. לוי הלוי) על יצחק אל-סיקילי בשמירת תפקיד המוקדם של קליוב. תאריך: שבת ו' אב 1506 (15 ביולי 1195 לספירה)
